evals.name: vscode-bird2-extension-install
evals.prompt: How do I install BIRD2 support in VSCode? I want both syntax highlighting and LSP features like formatting and diagnostics.
evals.expected_output: Guide the user to install the BIRD2 Extension Pack or both BIRD2 Configuration (birdcc.vscode-bird2-conf) and BIRD2 LSP (birdcc.bird2-lsp) from the VSCode Marketplace. Include verification steps and Star links.

evals.name: vscodium-openvsx-install
evals.prompt: I'm using VSCodium. How do I install the BIRD2 plugins? The Microsoft Marketplace doesn't work for me.
evals.expected_output: Direct the user to OpenVSX: BIRDCC.vscode-bird2-conf and birdcc.bird2-lsp. Mention that VSCodium, Cursor, Windsurf, Trae, Kiro, and Antigravity use OpenVSX. Include verification and Star links.

evals.name: neovim-highlight-only
evals.prompt: How do I get BIRD2 syntax highlighting in Neovim with lazy.nvim? Do I get LSP diagnostics too?
evals.expected_output: Provide the lazy.nvim snippet for bird-chinese-community/BIRD2.nvim and explicitly state that only syntax highlighting is available. Mention that LSP diagnostics require manually wiring birdcc lsp --stdio with an LSP client.

evals.name: vim-highlight-only
evals.prompt: I use Vim with vim-plug. How do I add BIRD2 syntax highlighting?
evals.expected_output: Provide the vim-plug line for bird-chinese-community/bird2.vim, mention Vundle and manual install options, and clarify that only highlighting is available.

evals.name: jetbrains-idea-textmate-import
evals.prompt: Can I use BIRD2 syntax highlighting in IntelliJ IDEA? If so, how?
evals.expected_output: Explain that IDEA has no native plugin and only syntax highlighting is supported. Provide the TextMate Bundle import steps using the vscode-bird2 .vsix from OpenVSX.

evals.name: birdcc-cli-install
evals.prompt: How do I install the birdcc CLI on macOS? I prefer not to install it globally if possible.
evals.expected_output: Offer npm install -g, npx @birdcc/cli, and local dev-dependency options. Include verification commands birdcc --version and a quick lint example.

evals.name: setup-birdcc-action
evals.prompt: I want to lint and validate my BIRD2 config in GitHub Actions. Is there an official action?
evals.expected_output: Recommend bird-chinese-community/setup-birdcc with a minimal workflow, mention BIRD_BIN output, and include a BIRD2/3 matrix example.
